scripts.build:jsx: mkdir -p dist/components && esbuild tweaks-panel.jsx --outfile=dist/tweaks-panel.js --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --format=iife --minify && for f in components/icons.jsx components/Nav.jsx components/Hero.jsx components/Team.jsx components/Logos.jsx components/Problem.jsx components/Solution.jsx components/Benefits.jsx components/Services.jsx components/Trust.jsx components/Scenarios.jsx components/CTA.jsx components/Footer.jsx; do esbuild "$f" --outfile="dist/${f%.jsx}.js" --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --format=iife --minify; done && esbuild app.jsx --outfile=dist/app.js --jsx-factory=React.createElement --jsx-fragment=React.Fragment --format=iife --minify && cat dist/tweaks-panel.js dist/components/icons.js dist/components/Nav.js dist/components/Hero.js dist/components/Team.js dist/components/Logos.js dist/components/Problem.js dist/components/Solution.js dist/components/Benefits.js dist/components/Services.js dist/components/Trust.js dist/components/Scenarios.js dist/components/CTA.js dist/components/Footer.js dist/app.js > dist/home.bundle.js
